home.badge: Free to use · No account required
home.heroSubtitle: Zamanla makes scheduling easy. Create a session, share a link, and see when your group is available — all in one heatmap view.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Set your title, date range, time window, and timezone. Takes 30 seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Send the participant link to your group via email, Slack, or wherever you communicate.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Watch availability fill in as responses come in. The best shared times rise to the top.

features.flexibleDesc: Define your date range, slot size, and daily hours. Works for any type of meeting.
features.recurringDesc: Set weekly availability patterns like "weekdays 9am–5pm" and let the grid fill itself.
features.groupDesc: A real-time heatmap shows when the most people are available at a glance.
features.timezoneDesc: Every participant sees times in the session timezone. No confusion across regions.
features.sharingDesc: Share a single link. No accounts needed. Participants just enter their name and go.
features.exportDesc: Download availability data as JSON or CSV for use in other tools.

home.ctaSectionSubtitle: Create your first session in under a minute. Free, no signup required.
home.footerTagline: Simple, open scheduling — no account required.

create.pageSubtitle: Set up your availability poll. You can share it right away.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional: describe the meeting or any context
create.submitFooter: You'll get a shareable link and an admin link to manage the session.
create.errorGeneric: Failed to create session. Please try again.

success.title: Session Created!
success.subtitle: {{title}} is ready to share.
success.adminWarningMessage: This is the only way to manage your session. There is no way to recover it if lost.

sessionClosed.title: Session Closed
sessionClosed.message: This session is no longer accepting responses.

join.title: Enter your name
join.subtitle: To share your availability for {{title}}
join.errorGeneric: Failed to join. Please try again.

errors.sessionNotFoundMessage: This session link may be incorrect or the session may have been deleted.

session.instructions: Tap or drag to mark your available times. Use recurring rules to auto-fill weekly patterns.

dialogs.closeMessage: Participants will no longer be able to submit or edit their availability. This cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteMessage: All data including participant responses will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

overview.participantsEmpty: No participants yet. Share the link below to get responses.

share.adminWarningMessage: Anyone with this link can manage, edit, or delete this session. There is no recovery if lost.
share.participantLinkDesc: Share this link with anyone you want to invite.

toast.sessionClosed: Session closed. No more responses will be accepted.

errors.sessionNotFoundMessage: This admin link may be incorrect or the session may have been deleted.
errors.accessDeniedMessage: You do not have permission to manage this session.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved. If you were trying to open a session link, please double-check the URL.
notFound.hint: Need help? Make sure you have the correct link.

availability.title: Your Availability
availability.instructions: Tap or drag to mark your available times. Use recurring rules to auto-fill weekly patterns.

grid.noSlots: No time slots available for this session.

rules.title: Recurring Availability
rules.subtitle: Choose days and times to auto-fill your schedule.
rules.noRules: Add a rule above to quickly fill your weekly schedule.

errors.noTimes: Enter both start and end time.
errors.invalidRange: Start time must be before end time.

results.noData: No availability submitted yet. Be the first to respond!

bestTimes.title: Best Times
bestTimes.topSubtitle: Ranked by number of available participants
bestTimes.shareHint: Share the session link to collect responses

validation.dateEndBeforeStart: End date must be on or after start date
validation.dayEndBeforeStart: Day end time must be after start time

errors.networkError: Network error — please check your connection.
